calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack; Sherry Sawyer CSR 5976 (Dept. 318)

Appearances:
Plaintiff DMG Asset Management LLC, represented by Gilbert Chung, is present.
Attorney Ivy P. Tseng, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Brian F. Kiernan is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 2701 Van Ness Aveue, no. 201, San Francisco, California.

The case is settled. The trial date of AUG-15-2011 is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Aug-11-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. IVY TSENG, TEL. NO. (925) 469-1690 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE TO ALLOW MS. TSENG TO PROVIDE A SIGNED PROOF OF SERVICE FROM THE PROCESS SERVER. ON THE SECOND CALLED OF THE MATTER AND NO SIGNED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING : PLAINTIFF DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
